history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A young Asian man with dark, messy hair, wearing a white ribbed tank top, takes a mirror selfie. He has a silver necklace and a beaded bracelet on his left wrist. He's also wearing sunglasses pushed up on his head and an ear cuff on his left ear. His tongue is sticking out playfully. He holds a black smartphone with a triple camera lens in his right hand, angled to capture the reflection. The background is simple, with a light-colored wall to his left and a grey curtain behind him. The lighting is soft and natural, highlighting his features. The overall mood is casual, playful, and confident. The color palette is dominated by neutral tones of white, grey, and black, with the subtle colors of the beaded bracelet adding a touch of detail.
